register_activation.description: register a trauma activation A as active
preconditions: I can only register a trauma activation A as active if it is not the case that A is active and it is not the case that the activation for A is finalized
effects: Once I register a trauma activation A as active, it is the case that A is active

reserve_treatment_bay.description: reserve a treatment bay B for a trauma activation A
preconditions: I can only reserve a treatment bay B for a trauma activation A if it is the case that A is active and a bay is available for B and the bay is compatible for activation of A with B
I can only reserve a treatment bay B for a trauma activation A if it is not the case that the resources for A are locked
effects: Once I reserve a treatment bay B for a trauma activation A, it is the case that A has reserved the bay B and the resources for A are locked
Once I reserve a treatment bay B for a trauma activation A, it is not the case anymore that a bay is available for B

release_treatment_bay.description: release a treatment bay B from a trauma activation A
preconditions: I can only release a treatment bay B from a trauma activation A if it is the case that A has reserved the bay B
I can only release a treatment bay B from a trauma activation A if it is not the case that the team brief for A is complete and it is not the case that the procedural provider for A is confirmed
effects: Once I release a treatment bay B from a trauma activation A, it is the case that a bay is available for B

Once I release a treatment bay B from a trauma activation A, it is not the case anymore that A has reserved the bay B and it is not the case anymore that the resources for A are locked and it is not the case anymore that a monitor is assigned to A and it is not the case anymore that the equipment is ready for A and it is not the case anymore that the personnel for A have been notified and it is not the case anymore that the procedure for A is scheduled and it is not the case anymore that blood is requested for activation A

assign_bedside_monitor_unit.description: assign a bedside monitor unit B to a trauma activation A
preconditions: I can only assign a bedside monitor unit B to a trauma activation A if it is the case that A is active and a bedside monitor unit is available for B
effects: Once I assign a bedside monitor unit B to a trauma activation A, it is the case that the activation A is assigned the bedside monitor unit B
Once I assign a bedside monitor unit B to a trauma activation A, it is not the case anymore that a bedside monitor unit is available for B

release_bedside_monitor_unit.description: release a bedside monitor unit B from a trauma activation A
preconditions: I can only release a bedside monitor unit B from a trauma activation A if it is the case that the activation A is assigned the bedside monitor unit B
effects: Once I release a bedside monitor unit B from a trauma activation A, it is the case that a bedside monitor unit is available for B
Once I release a bedside monitor unit B from a trauma activation A, it is not the case anymore that the activation A is assigned the bedside monitor unit B

confirm_monitor_setup.description: confirm monitor setup for a trauma activation A with a bedside monitor unit B
preconditions: I can only confirm monitor setup for a trauma activation A with a bedside monitor unit B if it is the case that A is active and the resources for A are locked and the activation A is assigned the bedside monitor unit B
I can only confirm monitor setup for a trauma activation A with a bedside monitor unit B if it is not the case that a monitor is assigned to A
effects: Once I confirm monitor setup for a trauma activation A with a bedside monitor unit B, it is the case that a monitor is assigned to A

notify_procedural_team.description: notify procedural team for a trauma activation A using a notification device B
preconditions: I can only notify procedural team for a trauma activation A using a notification device B if it is the case that A is active and the resources for A are locked and a notification device is available for B
I can only notify procedural team for a trauma activation A using a notification device B if it is not the case that a monitor is assigned to A
effects: Once I notify procedural team for a trauma activation A using a notification device B, it is the case that a monitor is assigned to A and the personnel for A have been notified
Once I notify procedural team for a trauma activation A using a notification device B, it is not the case anymore that a notification device is available for B

technician_prepare_equipment.description: technician an equipment technician C prepare a bedside monitor unit B for a trauma activation A
preconditions: I can only technician an equipment technician C prepare a bedside monitor unit B for a trauma activation A if it is the case that a monitor is assigned to A and the resources for A are locked and the activation A is assigned the bedside monitor unit B and an equipment technician is available for C
I can only technician an equipment technician C prepare a bedside monitor unit B for a trauma activation A if it is not the case that the equipment is ready for A
effects: Once I technician an equipment technician C prepare a bedside monitor unit B for a trauma activation A, it is the case that the equipment is ready for A
Once I technician an equipment technician C prepare a bedside monitor unit B for a trauma activation A, it is not the case anymore that the personnel for A have been notified

confirm_external_imaging.description: confirm external imaging for a trauma activation A using an imaging resource B
preconditions: I can only confirm external imaging for a trauma activation A using an imaging resource B if it is the case that the resources for A are locked and imaging for A is confirmed using B
I can only confirm external imaging for a trauma activation A using an imaging resource B if it is not the case that the equipment is ready for A
effects: Once I confirm external imaging for a trauma activation A using an imaging resource B, it is the case that the equipment is ready for A
Once I confirm external imaging for a trauma activation A using an imaging resource B, it is not the case anymore that the personnel for A have been notified

reserve_bedside_nurse.description: reserve a bedside nurse B for a trauma activation A
preconditions: I can only reserve a bedside nurse B for a trauma activation A if it is the case that A is active and a bedside nurse is available for B and a bedside nurse is eligible for activation of A with B
effects: Once I reserve a bedside nurse B for a trauma activation A, it is the case that the bedside nurse B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a bedside nurse B for a trauma activation A, it is not the case anymore that a bedside nurse is available for B

release_bedside_nurse.description: release a bedside nurse B from a trauma activation A
preconditions: I can only release a bedside nurse B from a trauma activation A if it is the case that the bedside nurse B is reserved for A
effects: Once I release a bedside nurse B from a trauma activation A, it is the case that a bedside nurse is available for B
Once I release a bedside nurse B from a trauma activation A, it is not the case anymore that the bedside nurse B is reserved for A

reserve_monitoring_device.description: reserve a monitoring device B for a trauma activation A

effects: Once I reserve a monitoring device B for a trauma activation A, it is the case that the monitoring device B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a monitoring device B for a trauma activation A, it is not the case anymore that a monitoring device is available for B

release_monitoring_device.description: release a monitoring device B from a trauma activation A

effects: Once I release a monitoring device B from a trauma activation A, it is the case that a monitoring device is available for B
Once I release a monitoring device B from a trauma activation A, it is not the case anymore that the monitoring device B is reserved for A

reserve_respiratory_therapist.description: reserve a respiratory therapist B for a trauma activation A
preconditions: I can only reserve a respiratory therapist B for a trauma activation A if it is the case that A is active and a respiratory therapist is available for B and a respiratory therapist is eligible for activation of A with B
effects: Once I reserve a respiratory therapist B for a trauma activation A, it is the case that the respiratory therapist B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a respiratory therapist B for a trauma activation A, it is not the case anymore that a respiratory therapist is available for B

release_respiratory_therapist.description: release a respiratory therapist B from a trauma activation A

effects: Once I release a respiratory therapist B from a trauma activation A, it is the case that a respiratory therapist is available for B

reserve_supply_cart.description: reserve a supply cart B for a trauma activation A
preconditions: I can only reserve a supply cart B for a trauma activation A if it is the case that A is active and a supply cart is available for B and a supply cart is compatible for activation of A with B
effects: Once I reserve a supply cart B for a trauma activation A, it is the case that the supply cart B is reserved for A
Once I reserve a supply cart B for a trauma activation A, it is not the case anymore that a supply cart is available for B

release_supply_cart.description: release a supply cart B from a trauma activation A

effects: Once I release a supply cart B from a trauma activation A, it is the case that a supply cart is available for B
Once I release a supply cart B from a trauma activation A, it is not the case anymore that the supply cart B is reserved for A

assign_clinical_role_for_procedure.description: assign a clinical role B to a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse C and a monitoring device D
preconditions: I can only assign a clinical role B to a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse C and a monitoring device D if it is the case that the resources for A are locked and the bedside nurse C is reserved for A and the monitoring device D is reserved for A and a clinical role is available for B and a clinical role is required for activation of A with B
I can only assign a clinical role B to a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse C and a monitoring device D if it is not the case that the team brief for A is complete
effects: Once I assign a clinical role B to a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse C and a monitoring device D, it is the case that the clinical role B is assigned to A and the team brief for A is complete
Once I assign a clinical role B to a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse C and a monitoring device D, it is not the case anymore that a clinical role is available for B

assemble_team_with_blood.description: assemble team for a trauma activation A with a clinical role B, a respiratory therapist C, and a blood product unit D
preconditions: I can only assemble team for a trauma activation A with a clinical role B, a respiratory therapist C, and a blood product unit D if it is the case that the resources for A are locked and the respiratory therapist C is reserved for A and a blood product is available for D and a clinical role is available for B and a clinical role is required for activation of A with B and a blood product is compatible for activation of A with D
I can only assemble team for a trauma activation A with a clinical role B, a respiratory therapist C, and a blood product unit D if it is not the case that the team brief for A is complete
effects: Once I assemble team for a trauma activation A with a clinical role B, a respiratory therapist C, and a blood product unit D, it is the case that the clinical role B is assigned to A and the team brief for A is complete and blood is requested for activation A and the personnel for A have been notified

Once I assemble team for a trauma activation A with a clinical role B, a respiratory therapist C, and a blood product unit D, it is not the case anymore that a clinical role is available for B and it is not the case anymore that a blood product is available for D

clear_blood_request.description: clear blood request for a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse B and a monitoring device C
preconditions: I can only clear blood request for a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse B and a monitoring device C if it is the case that the team brief for A is complete and blood is requested for activation A and the bedside nurse B is reserved for A and the monitoring device C is reserved for A
effects: Once I clear blood request for a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse B and a monitoring device C, it is not the case anymore that blood is requested for activation A and it is not the case anymore that the personnel for A have been notified

confirm_procedural_provider.description: confirm procedural provider for a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse B, a monitoring device C, and a procedural provider role D
preconditions: I can only confirm procedural provider for a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse B, a monitoring device C, and a procedural provider role D if it is the case that the equipment is ready for A and the team brief for A is complete and the bedside nurse B is reserved for A and the monitoring device C is reserved for A and the activation A is associated with the staff role D

I can only confirm procedural provider for a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse B, a monitoring device C, and a procedural provider role D if it is not the case that the personnel for A have been notified and it is not the case that the procedural provider for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm procedural provider for a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse B, a monitoring device C, and a procedural provider role D, it is the case that the procedural provider for A is confirmed

confirm_anesthesia_team.description: confirm anesthesia team for a trauma activation A with a respiratory therapist B, a supply cart C, and an anesthetist role D
preconditions: I can only confirm anesthesia team for a trauma activation A with a respiratory therapist B, a supply cart C, and an anesthetist role D if it is the case that the equipment is ready for A and the team brief for A is complete and the respiratory therapist B is reserved for A and the supply cart C is reserved for A and the activation A is associated with the staff role D

I can only confirm anesthesia team for a trauma activation A with a respiratory therapist B, a supply cart C, and an anesthetist role D if it is not the case that the procedural provider for A is confirmed
effects: Once I confirm anesthesia team for a trauma activation A with a respiratory therapist B, a supply cart C, and an anesthetist role D, it is the case that the procedural provider for A is confirmed and the personnel for A have been notified

begin_procedure.description: begin procedure for a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse B and a monitoring device C
preconditions: I can only begin procedure for a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse B and a monitoring device C if it is the case that the procedural provider for A is confirmed and the personnel for A have been notified and the bedside nurse B is reserved for A and the monitoring device C is reserved for A
effects: Once I begin procedure for a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse B and a monitoring device C, it is the case that the procedure for A is scheduled

Once I begin procedure for a trauma activation A with a bedside nurse B and a monitoring device C, it is not the case anymore that the personnel for A have been notified and it is not the case anymore that the equipment is ready for A and it is not the case anymore that blood is requested for activation A

technician_prepare_equipment_secondary.description: technician prepares equipment for a trauma activation A using a bedside monitor unit B with assistance from an equipment technician C
preconditions: I can only technician prepares equipment for a trauma activation A using a bedside monitor unit B with assistance from an equipment technician C if it is the case that the procedure for A is scheduled and the procedural provider for A is confirmed and the resources for A are locked and the activation A is assigned the bedside monitor unit B and an equipment technician is available for C

I can only technician prepares equipment for a trauma activation A using a bedside monitor unit B with assistance from an equipment technician C if it is not the case that the equipment is ready for A
effects: Once I technician prepares equipment for a trauma activation A using a bedside monitor unit B with assistance from an equipment technician C, it is the case that the equipment is ready for A

mark_monitoring_check_complete.description: mark monitoring check as complete for a trauma activation A using a bedside monitor unit B
preconditions: I can only mark monitoring check as complete for a trauma activation A using a bedside monitor unit B if it is the case that the procedural provider for A is confirmed and the equipment is ready for A and the activation A is assigned the bedside monitor unit B

I can only mark monitoring check as complete for a trauma activation A using a bedside monitor unit B if it is not the case that the personnel for A have been notified and it is not the case that the activation notification for A is acknowledged
effects: Once I mark monitoring check as complete for a trauma activation A using a bedside monitor unit B, it is the case that the activation notification for A is acknowledged

acknowledge_notification_device.description: acknowledge notification for a trauma activation A using a notification device B
preconditions: I can only acknowledge notification for a trauma activation A using a notification device B if it is the case that the procedural provider for A is confirmed and the equipment is ready for A and a notification device is available for B

I can only acknowledge notification for a trauma activation A using a notification device B if it is not the case that the personnel for A have been notified and it is not the case that the activation notification for A is acknowledged
effects: Once I acknowledge notification for a trauma activation A using a notification device B, it is the case that the activation notification for A is acknowledged
Once I acknowledge notification for a trauma activation A using a notification device B, it is not the case anymore that a notification device is available for B

reserve_imaging_slot.description: reserve imaging slot for a trauma activation A using an imaging resource B
preconditions: I can only reserve imaging slot for a trauma activation A using an imaging resource B if it is the case that the activation notification for A is acknowledged and an imaging resource is available for B and imaging authorization for B is requested for activation A
effects: Once I reserve imaging slot for a trauma activation A using an imaging resource B, it is the case that the activation A has an external imaging link B
Once I reserve imaging slot for a trauma activation A using an imaging resource B, it is not the case anymore that an imaging resource is available for B

link_local_external_imaging.description: link local an activation reference A with external imaging an activation reference B using an imaging resource C
preconditions: I can only link local an activation reference A with external imaging an activation reference B using an imaging resource C if it is the case that A is active and the activation A has a remote coordinator present and imaging for A is requested using C and the activation B has an external imaging link C
I can only link local an activation reference A with external imaging an activation reference B using an imaging resource C if it is not the case that imaging for A is confirmed using C
effects: Once I link local an activation reference A with external imaging an activation reference B using an imaging resource C, it is the case that imaging for A is confirmed using C

confirm_equipment_technician.description: confirm an equipment technician C for a trauma activation A with a bedside monitor unit B
preconditions: I can only confirm an equipment technician C for a trauma activation A with a bedside monitor unit B if it is the case that A is active and the activation A has a remote coordinator present and the equipment is ready for A and the activation notification for A is acknowledged and the activation A is assigned the bedside monitor unit B and an equipment technician is available for C
I can only confirm an equipment technician C for a trauma activation A with a bedside monitor unit B if it is not the case that an equipment technician confirmed A
effects: Once I confirm an equipment technician C for a trauma activation A with a bedside monitor unit B, it is the case that an equipment technician confirmed A

finalize_activation_local.description: finalize the activation for a trauma activation A locally
preconditions: I can only finalize the activation for a trauma activation A locally if it is the case that the activation A has a local coordinator present and A is active and the resources for A are locked and the team brief for A is complete and the procedural provider for A is confirmed and the activation notification for A is acknowledged and the equipment is ready for A
I can only finalize the activation for a trauma activation A locally if it is not the case that the activation for A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize the activation for a trauma activation A locally, it is the case that the activation for A is finalized

finalize_activation_with_imaging.description: finalize the activation for a trauma activation A with imaging using an imaging resource B
preconditions: I can only finalize the activation for a trauma activation A with imaging using an imaging resource B if it is the case that the activation A has a remote coordinator present and A is active and the resources for A are locked and the team brief for A is complete and the procedural provider for A is confirmed and the activation notification for A is acknowledged and the equipment is ready for A and imaging for A is confirmed using B
I can only finalize the activation for a trauma activation A with imaging using an imaging resource B if it is not the case that the activation for A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize the activation for a trauma activation A with imaging using an imaging resource B, it is the case that the activation for A is finalized

finalize_activation_with_technician.description: finalize the activation for a trauma activation A with technician confirmation
preconditions: I can only finalize the activation for a trauma activation A with technician confirmation if it is the case that the activation A has a remote coordinator present and A is active and the resources for A are locked and the team brief for A is complete and the procedural provider for A is confirmed and the activation notification for A is acknowledged and the equipment is ready for A and an equipment technician confirmed A
I can only finalize the activation for a trauma activation A with technician confirmation if it is not the case that the activation for A is finalized
effects: Once I finalize the activation for a trauma activation A with technician confirmation, it is the case that the activation for A is finalized

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a trauma activation or a treatment bay or a clinical role or a monitoring device or a bedside nurse or a respiratory therapist or a bedside monitor unit or a notification device or a imaging resource or a equipment technician or a blood product unit or a supply cart or a staff role token is also a object
Everything that is a procedural provider role or a anesthetist role is also a staff role token
Everything that is a external activation reference or a local activation reference is also a trauma activation
